docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY BURROUGHS, BRIEN AS TO DEFENDANT BOEDDEKER, BRIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2009 - JUDGMENT.
